page: Microsoft Azure D4as_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dasv7 server family. It is equipped with 4 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 AMD processor architecture. The instance is provisioned with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. The underlying virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. There are no bundled complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance. Additionally, the configuration does not feature any graphics processing units, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated workloads.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D4as_v7 offers a standard resource density profile typical of general-purpose hardware classes. The balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio is designed for workloads that require a steady distribution of compute and memory resources without the premium cost of specialized memory-optimized or compute-optimized tiers. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include standard web serving, application servers, and general-purpose development or testing environments.
description: The Microsoft Azure D4as_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dasv7 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD processor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. It also lacks bundled complimentary public IPv4 addresses and graphics processing units. The qualitative cost-efficiency profile of this server is centered on its balanced resource density, making it a practical option for workloads requiring steady compute and memory distribution. The D4as_v7 is designed for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application hosting, and development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D4as_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dasv7 family featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under Microsoft Hyper-V.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, sixteen gigabytes of memory, and premium storage compatibility.

Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Suited for web serving, application hosting, and development environments
